Uses of Interface
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.BleDevice

Packages that use BleDevice
Package
Description
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api
Public API for the Bluetooth LE library for LEGO Powered Up and compatible devices.
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl
Fluent internal DSL built on top of the public BLE API.

  • Uses of BleDevice in ch.varani.bricks.ble.api

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NonNull BleDevice
    BleConnection.device()
    Returns the device this connection belongs to.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ScanCallback.onDeviceFound(@NonNull BleDevice device)
    Called each time a BLE peripheral is discovered or its advertisement data is updated.

  • Uses of BleDevice in ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl

    Methods in ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl that return BleDevice
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NonNull BleDevice
    ConnectionDsl.device()
    Returns the device this connection belongs to.
    @NonNull BleDevice
    DeviceDsl.device()
    Returns the underlying BleDevice for callers that need direct access to the raw API.
    Methods in ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl that return types with arguments of type BleDevice
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NonNull List<BleDevice>
    ScanDsl.collect(int count)
    Starts a scan and blocks until count devices have been discovered or the configured timeout elapses, then stops the scan.
